enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Hola Amigo'?

'Hola Amigo' conveys a message of friendship and celebration, inviting listeners to enjoy life and have fun.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Rum'?

In Rum, the song is featured during a lively party scene, highlighting the camaraderie among the characters.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Hola Amigo'?

The song is sung by Anirudh and Balan Kashmir, with music composed by Anirudh himself.

When was 'Hola Amigo' released?

'Hola Amigo' was released on June 8, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Hola Amigo' from the movie Rum is an upbeat and energetic track that celebrates friendship and joy. It features lively vocals by Anirudh and Balan Kashmir, creating a vibrant atmosphere perfect for parties. The lyrics invite listeners to embrace the fun and excitement of life, evoking feelings of happiness and camaraderie. Overall, this song is a delightful addition to any celebration, making it a go-to choice for festive occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hola Amigo from the movie Rum is a vibrant celebration of friendship and joy, featuring the dynamic collaboration of Anirudh's catchy beats and Balan Kashmir's lively vocals. This song perfectly captures the essence of a fun-filled party atmosphere, making it an instant favorite for celebrations. Get ready to groove to this energetic track that will keep you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Hello friend, hello lady. Hello friend, hello friend, hello lady.
In the next street, the boy is waiting for you.
The boy who will be waiting for you will forget you.
Your beauty is written all over your face.
I enjoy watching your beauty, but you are not good, I am not good, the town is not good, no one is good, you have no work, you have no time, I cannot help you.
Hello friend, hello lady. Hello friend, hello lady.
You will eat with money, but you are just a fool.
You will fix the match for money, but you are just watching TV.
You are the one who brings shame, tell me what is wrong.
You say what is wrong when the song plays and the crowd dances.
Hello friend, hello lady. Hello friend, hello lady.
